name: enterprise-frontend-standards
description: Enterprise frontend standard component/page library and contract checker.

scripts.check:sample: node packages/cli/bin/efs-check.mjs examples/sample-app/enterprise-pages && node packages/cli/bin/efs-check.mjs examples/runtime-demo/enterprise-pages
scripts.lint:sample: node packages/cli/bin/efs-lint.mjs examples/sample-app && node packages/cli/bin/efs-lint.mjs examples/runtime-demo
scripts.lint:sample:ast: node packages/cli/bin/efs-lint-ast.mjs examples/sample-app && node packages/cli/bin/efs-lint-ast.mjs examples/runtime-demo
scripts.ci: npm run test && npm run check:sample && npm run lint:sample && npm run lint:sample:ast
